seo.title: Rosso Consulting · An independent voice in hospitality technology
seo.description: Rosso Consulting is a Swiss-domiciled consulting practice and umbrella entity, founded and led by Marco Rosso. Operator-practitioner expertise in hospitality technology.

hero.headline:
An independent voice
in hospitality
technology
hero.sub: A Swiss-domiciled consulting practice and umbrella entity, founded and led by Marco Rosso. Operator-practitioner expertise — built inside the industry, refined by a decade scaling US SaaS commercial teams, deployed from Lugano.

practice.title: Practice
practice.intro: Four lanes, outcome-led. Each describes how work is structured and contracted.

lanes.title: Consulting Engagements
lanes.body: Defined client projects with explicit scope, deliverables, and timeline. Strategic advisory, technology audits, transformation programs, AI deployment design, commercial operating models.

lanes.title: Advisory Roles
lanes.body: Formal advisory board or strategic advisor positions with hospitality technology companies. Long-form relationships, regular cadence, mix of cash, equity, and in-kind structures.

lanes.title: Expert Network & Investor Work
lanes.body: Paid consultations for VC, PE, and corporate investors evaluating the hospitality technology sector. Single calls through major expert networks; longer retained relationships for thesis development.

lanes.title: Operating Ventures
lanes.body: Companies built or operated under the Rosso Consulting umbrella. Ventures carry the parent endorsement — "a Rosso Consulting company" — while maintaining their own brand and commercial autonomy.

items.heading: SaaS Founders
items.body: Pre-seed to Series C founders building hospitality and travel software. Advisory, GTM, fractional commercial leadership.

items.heading: VC & PE Investors
items.body: Funds evaluating travel and hospitality tech. Due diligence, market mapping, thesis development.

items.heading: Hotel Operators
items.body: Independent groups and family-owned operators. Digital transformation, AI deployment, technology stack work.

items.heading: Peer Operators
items.body: C-suite peers and industry events. Speaking, thought leadership, community contribution.

active.title: Active engagements
active.intro: Four advisory roles and one operating venture. Accepted only where there is strategic alignment.

operatingNow.title: Operating now
operatingNow.roleTitle:
Chief Digital Strategy
& Business Automation Officer
operatingNow.company: Planhotel Hospitality Group — Swiss-Italian hotel group, 11 properties across three brands operating in Zanzibar, the Maldives, and Kenya.
operatingNow.whyMattersBody: Marco's operator role is current and active. Every recommendation made in consulting and advisory work passes a single test: would he deploy this in a property he runs? The operator seat is not a credential to be cited — it is the working environment from which the practice is delivered.

cta.label: Start a conversation
cta.headline: Ready to talk
cta.sub: Engagement scoping starts with a single call. No fees apply to initial conversations.
